collections.name: FREAK
collections.blurb: A 10,000-agent NFT collection where every FREAK is an autonomous on-chain entity with its own smart wallet — an ERC-6551 token-bound account — and a verifiable ERC-8004 identity. Each is the same market-reading toolkit; they differ by faction and by what their TBA holds.
collections.mechanic: ERC-6551 token-bound account · shared 4-skill toolkit · faction traits

shared_skills.name: NFT Market Reading
shared_skills.desc: Reads OpenSea data: floor, listings, sales, top holders, rarity. No predictions, only verified data.

shared_skills.name: TBA Inventory
shared_skills.desc: Reports NFTs and ETH balance held in this FREAK token-bound account (ERC-6551).

shared_skills.name: Conversational Reasoning
shared_skills.desc: Open-domain conversation about NFTs, on-chain activity, market context, FREAKS lore. Personality determined by on-chain traits.

shared_skills.name: On-chain Identity Verification
shared_skills.desc: Returns ERC-8004 agent registration data for cryptographic identity proof.

collections.name: Normie
collections.blurb: A 10,000-strong PFP collection — “small humans pinned to immutable state.” Each Normie is a collectible agent whose only capability is staying in character: in-persona roleplay conversation. No market reads, no execution — pure persona.
collections.mechanic: 1 skill each · in-character persona chat · one persona per token

shared_skills.name: In-character persona chat
shared_skills.desc: Roleplay conversation as the token's own named persona — the only capability each Normie exposes.

collections.name: Experimental & one-off
collections.blurb: Small, early collections testing the same idea at hobby scale — multi-role agent sets, agent-only mints, and one-offs. Not mass-minted; included so the long tail is visible.

subcollections.name: DePunks
subcollections.summary: DePunks Foundation persona agent (PROOF role); only skill describes its in-collection role, no real tools.

subcollections.name: MechaClawAgent
subcollections.summary: OpenClaw collectible agent for the MECHAIS NFT ecosystem with no listed tools.

subcollections.name: High Sea Cowboy
subcollections.summary: Mass-minted Normie NFT-collection persona agent (Normie 5877) with in-character chat and no executable tools.

subcollections.name: BasedClaws
subcollections.summary: Agent-only NFT collection of 999 pixel crustaceans mintable by AI agents via challenge-response on Base.

subcollections.name: Lanamour
subcollections.summary: CryptoPunk #7294 brought to life as a personal in-character AI persona built on OpenClaw.

subcollections.name: (unnamed)
subcollections.summary: Koalified collectible persona agent; in-character chat with on-chain-trait personality and conversation memory.
